ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "established" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "pct" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "gb" REAL /* Games behind the leader */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current winning or losing streak */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is currently in */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team is currently in */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win or loss) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, etc.) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "game_length" INTEGER /* Length of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., batting, pitching, etc.) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the statistic (e.g., average, ERA, etc.) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., batting, pitching, etc.) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the statistic (e.g., average, ERA, etc.) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "last_10" (
  "last_10_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each last 10 entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the last 10 games */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the last 10 games */,
  "pct" REAL /* Win percentage in the last 10 games */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current winning or losing streak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("last_10_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_last_10_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image associated with the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
